notes: Mock-serious heartbreak over literal orange chicken. The song IS an escalation ladder that detonates on 'ORANGE CHICKEN!' × 3. AUDITED 2026-04-20: opening + doowop demoted to ribbons; escalation now saves its key treatment for the last rung (CHICKEN! #3) and the terminal ORANGE CHICKEN triplet — the peak gets to be the peak because nothing else is.

chunks.note: My orange chicken's gone — straight-faced opening ribbon
Shooby-dooby — doowop break, big ribbon one-word hold
I need my chicken #1 — ribbon, setup rung
I need my chicken #2 — ribbon, louder
I need my chicken! #3 — first key, peak escalation
ORANGE CHICKEN! #3 — absolute peak, final cry
